title: Tromsoe Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Tromsoe, with a Z-Score of -3.09. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Tromsoe are extremely cold, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 11.8 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 65%, and the wind speed is moderate at 8.3 km/h. 
 The lack of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) indicates that the temperature is well below average, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap.
